Battery voltage monitoring, management functions, and USB connection detection for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[battery_adc_conversion.c](battery_adc_conversion.c.md)**: Converts ADC readings to millivolts with scaling factors for battery voltage monitoring.
- **[battery_common.c](battery_common.c.md)**: Functions for monitoring battery voltage, checking charging status, and controlling charge enablement.
- **[battery_pmic.c](battery_pmic.c.md)**: Functions for battery management, including initialization, voltage reading, and charge control.
- **[battery_tintin.c](battery_tintin.c.md)**: Manages battery charging and USB connection detection for Pebble firmware, including debounce handling and charge control.
